/usr/bin/c++     CMakeFiles/server.dir/src/dynamic_main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/server.dir/src/MysqlOperator.cpp.o CMakeFiles/server.dir/src/BaseDetector.cpp.o CMakeFiles/server.dir/src/PhoneDetector.cpp.o CMakeFiles/server.dir/src/DetectorManager.cpp.o CMakeFiles/server.dir/src/BaseMasking.cpp.o CMakeFiles/server.dir/src/StarMasking.cpp.o CMakeFiles/server.dir/src/AddressMasking.cpp.o CMakeFiles/server.dir/src/SensitiveFieldsManager.cpp.o CMakeFiles/server.dir/src/EmailMasking.cpp.o CMakeFiles/server.dir/src/GeneralizationMasking.cpp.o CMakeFiles/server.dir/src/DbField.cpp.o CMakeFiles/server.dir/src/DbTable.cpp.o CMakeFiles/server.dir/src/StructureMasking.cpp.o CMakeFiles/server.dir/src/ReplaceMasking.cpp.o CMakeFiles/server.dir/src/NoiseMasking.cpp.o CMakeFiles/server.dir/src/AccountManager.cpp.o  -o server  -levent -lmysqlclient -lsqlparser -lsodium -lm
